positive: An intricate, minimalist graphic design featuring a lone, stylized mountain range silhouette against a vibrant, ethereal sunset gradient. The mountains are rendered in solid, deep charcoal black, with sharp, clean edges. The background should transition smoothly from warm peach and soft lavender near the horizon to deep indigo at the top. Include subtle geometric celestial elements, such as stylized constellations or crescent moons, radiating around the peaks. The composition must be highly symmetrical and centered, optimized for apparel printing. Style: Modern retro travel poster meets Art Deco graphic design. Lighting: Dramatic backlight to emphasize the silhouette. Color palette: High contrast black, peach, lavender, indigo. Composition: Rule of thirds applied to the horizon line for stability.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cartoon, messy, noise, extra limbs, bad anatomy, realistic photography, low detail, busy, clutter, ugly
